mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_realinfo t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.real_name like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.realName},'%')
AND t.card_num like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.cardNum},'%')
AND t.img_front like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.imgFront},'%')
AND t.img_back like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.imgBack},'%')
AND t.birthday like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.birthday},'%')
AND t.address like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.address},'%')
AND t.validity_date like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.validityDate},'%')
AND t.issuing_authority like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.issuingAuthority},'%')
AND t.nation like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.nation},'%')
AND t.gender like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.gender},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.card_type like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.cardType},'%')
AND t.person like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.person},'%')
AND t.capital like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.capital},'%')
AND t.business like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.business},'%')
AND t.enterprise_name like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.enterpriseName},'%')
AND t.credit_code like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.creditCode},'%')
AND t.reg_date like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.regDate},'%')
AND t.business_term like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.businessTerm},'%')
AND t.residence like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.residence},'%')
AND t.reg_authority like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.regAuthority},'%')
AND t.award_date like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.awardDate},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM member_realinfo t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.real_name like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.realName},'%')
AND t.card_num like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.cardNum},'%')
AND t.img_front like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.imgFront},'%')
AND t.img_back like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.imgBack},'%')
AND t.birthday like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.birthday},'%')
AND t.address like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.address},'%')
AND t.validity_date like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.validityDate},'%')
AND t.issuing_authority like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.issuingAuthority},'%')
AND t.nation like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.nation},'%')
AND t.gender like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.gender},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.status},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.card_type like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.cardType},'%')
AND t.person like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.person},'%')
AND t.capital like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.capital},'%')
AND t.business like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.business},'%')
AND t.enterprise_name like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.enterpriseName},'%')
AND t.credit_code like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.creditCode},'%')
AND t.reg_date like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.regDate},'%')
AND t.business_term like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.businessTerm},'%')
AND t.residence like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.residence},'%')
AND t.reg_authority like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.regAuthority},'%')
AND t.award_date like concat('%',#{memberRealinfoEntity.awardDate},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_realinfo t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}

SELECT t.* FROM member_realinfo t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
and t.member_id = #{memberId}
